description_long: This is a rectangular mirror with a geometric, frosted pattern on its reflective surface, giving it a modern and decorative appearance. The mirror is encased in a medium-brown wooden frame that is simple and angular, with a visible thickness and a slightly recessed design. The frame appears sturdy and well-crafted, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The frosted pattern on the glass creates a mosaic effect, partially obscuring the reflection and adding visual interest. The back and sides of the frame are solid wood, with no visible mounting hardware, suggesting it is designed to be free-standing or possibly leaned against a wall. The overall construction suggests durability and a contemporary style suitable for urban environments.
description: A rectangular mirror with a geometric frosted pattern, set in a thick, minimalist wooden frame. The design is modern and decorative, with a sturdy and clean-lined appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full geometric frosted pattern on the mirror surface and the rectangular wooden frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness and depth of the wooden frame, as well as the recessed placement of the mirror.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view, again showing the frosted pattern and the frame's rectangular shape, with the open bottom edge visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the frame's depth and solid wood construction.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, minimalist wooden frame in medium brown, with a thick profile and clean lines; no ornate or decorative elements.
attribute_reflective_quality: slightly distorted due to geometric frosted pattern
